stepTexts.0: You know how to finish a session. Now you'll learn something harder: asking for more.
stepTexts.10: At the end of a session, if you want more, you can ask. But you have to deserve it, and beg for it.
stepTexts.20: First beg: tell me you didn't get enough.
stepTexts.32: Second: promise me you'll do better next time.
stepTexts.44: Last: beg me to take my cock out for you again.
stepTexts.56: Good. From now on, at the end of every session, you'll have a button to beg me for more. Use it if you deserve it.
